title: Annoying Dog Painting
description: A resource pack that replaces the kebab painting with the Annoying Dog from Undertale and adds custom fandom themed splash texts to your main menu
body:
# **Annoying Dog Painting & More**

### **Description**
Bring the world of **Undertale** into your Minecraft experience! This resource pack is designed for those who want to carry a little bit of "determination" into their builds. It replaces vanilla assets with high-quality, community-inspired pixel art from Toby Fox's masterpiece.

### **Features**
*   **Annoying Dog Painting:** Replaces the **1x1 "kebab"** (or "alban") painting. The dog has been placed on a custom-scaled item frame background to blend perfectly with the Minecraft aesthetic.
*   **Custom Splash Texts:** Experience iconic Undertale quotes on the main menu! From "Stay determined" to "The dog absorbed the splash text," your title screen will never be the same.
*   **Vanilla Friendly:** Designed at a crisp resolution that fits the game's original art style without looking out of place.

### **How to Use**
1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Activate it in-game and look for the 1x1 paintings!

### **Credits & Source**
*   **Annoying Dog / Undertale:** All characters and original concepts belong to **Toby Fox**.
*   **Design Choice:** The painting background uses a modified vanilla **Item Frame** texture for better integration.
*   **Pack Creator:** ProfessorRedman
